title: styrax benzoin var. benzoin
intro: Styrax benzoin var. benzoin, also known as the gum benzoin tree, is a deciduous tree native to Southeast Asia, specifically Indonesia and Malaysia. The resin of the plant has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of the plant include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and soothing respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including essential oils, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal benefits.
